select_when: Institutional design, incentives, and power structure matter more than the stated ideology or surface narrative.
Governance systems or policy responses must be compared without assuming one familiar national frame fits all cases.
Strategic interpretation depends on seeing how formal rules and informal behavior interact across different system designs.
The analyst needs structural comparison across systems rather than superficial analogy from one visible label.
avoid_when: Comparison is collapsing into shallow analogy that treats unlike systems as equivalent because they share one visible institution.
The system map has grown so large that everything is connected to everything and no actionable comparison remains.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model on structural institutional comparison and incentive mapping rather than on surface political analogy.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 4 or import donor-shaped higher-order semantics in this coverage batch.
Kept the routing surface conservative so Layer 2B stays canonical and Waves 2 to 4 stay preview-only.
open_questions: Wave 4 candidacy stays observational only for this batch.

select_when.note: Select conditions stay close to the source activation language and are compressed only enough for routing use.

avoid_when.note: Avoid conditions preserve the source anti-patterns and misuse warnings with conservative normalization.

input_type.note: The typed input label is a reviewed routing compression of the source context.

output_type.note: The typed output label compresses the intervention shape implied by the raw source.

reasoning_types.note: Reasoning taxonomy labels are normalized onto the existing Layer 2B vocabulary.
